anvil:gcp:SvelteKitSite.description: SvelteKitSite is an Anvil-managed SvelteKit deployment on GCP. Static assets go to Cloud Storage behind Cloud CDN. Server code runs on Cloud Run.

domain.description: Custom domain name for the site. When set, Anvil configures DNS and TLS certificates automatically.

environment.description: Environment variables injected at both build time and runtime. Build time: available via $env/static and import.meta.env during static generation and prerendering. Runtime: set on the compute service (Lambda/Cloud Run) for SSR and API routes via $env/dynamic.

minInstances.description: Minimum number of Cloud Run instances to keep warm. Set to 1 or higher to eliminate cold starts. Defaults to 0.

path.description: Path to the SvelteKit project directory, relative to the project root (where anvil.yaml lives). Not relative to the anvil.config file.

bucketName.description: The Cloud Storage bucket name storing static assets.

url.description: The URL where the site is accessible.
